PhysBrain

An Egocentric2Embodiment pipeline turning raw human egocentric video into schema-driven, evidence-grounded supervision across seven VQA modes, yielding the ~3M-instance E2E-3M dataset.

01Data-usage path

Example egocentric media
PhysBrain turns egocentric human video into VQA supervision; the project page shows teaser videos across lab, factory, and household scenes.
example frame · example video · project page
PhysBrain, Lin et al., arXiv:2512.16793, 2025

PhysBrain's Egocentric2Embodiment (E2E) pipeline converts raw first-person human video into schema-driven, evidence-grounded supervision instead of collecting robot-specific data. It draws on three domains, Ego4D for open-world household activity, BuildAI for industrial workflows, and EgoDex for laboratory manipulation, and produces about three million VQA instances (the E2E-3M dataset) spanning seven question modes: temporal, attribute, spatial, reasoning, trajectory, mechanics, and summary. The PhysBrain embodied model is trained on E2E-3M and reports large gains in egocentric understanding and planning. Access is currently paper and project-page only; the dataset is unreleased and no license is stated.

ingest raw egocentric video (Ego4D, BuildAI, EgoDex)
→
schema-driven structuring into seven VQA modes
→
evidence-grounded supervision generation
→
aggregate ~3M instances into E2E-3M
→
train and evaluate the PhysBrain embodied model

04Why this is a descriptive entry

Verified via arXiv 2512.16793 and zgc-embodyai.github.io/PhysBrain. E2E-3M dataset unreleased; no license stated. The repository hosts the project website only.

PhysBrain describes the E2E-3M dataset of about three million VQA instances, but that dataset is not yet released, the public repository hosts only the project website, and no license is stated. Because there is no downloadable corpus and no redistribution terms, PhysBrain is documented descriptively and should be revisited if E2E-3M is published.
